meaning: n.亚瑟王的圆桌武士之一人,高洁之士
examples: The young man's name was Galahad.
Sir Galahad was the noblest and purest of the Knights of the Round Table.
Just as 16 Sir Galahad rescued Guinevere from the dragon, I will rescue you.
Ex-Welsh Guardsman Mr Weston was badly burned when the Sir Galahad troop ship was destroyed.
The Motts survived the Argentine attack on the Sir Galahad in which 48 men - 32 Welsh Guards - died.
